repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 records no completed PartialID entry; no other active qid supplies this data-fusion latent-feasibility functional.

published_prior_art.cite: LannersRudinVolfovskyParikh2025, §4, Lemma 1 and Remark 1 define the same propensity-weighted envelopes and replace pointwise compatibility with an expectation test; the proposed common-latent-law iff and constructive extension are additional.
LannersRudinVolfovskyParikh2025, Remark 1 identifies the fixed-nuisance expectation test but gives no two-stratum signed-cancellation witness for it.
LannersRudinVolfovskyParikh2025, §4/Remark 1: rho=gamma=0 restores the two baseline exchangeability restrictions; the displayed conditional-mean equality is its direct specialization.

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 has no completed PartialID inference kernel.

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovLeeRosen2013, MastenPoirier2020, FangSantos2019, ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML, and LuedtkeVanderLaan2016 provide components, not learned-nuisance simultaneous inference for this data-fusion compatibility zero set at positive-mass ties.

soundness_flags.label: ass:mandatory-mixture
soundness_flags.one_line: This is implied by the definitions of q_t0 and c_t together with observed extension, consistency, and conditional total expectation, so it should be a derived lemma rather than a member condition of M(P,rho,gamma).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Move ass:mandatory-mixture out of the latent-class definition and state it as a short consequence lemma; retain the same mixture identity in the proof of Theorem 1.
State the exact active-face score formulas and the series basis in the inference handle, then distinguish law-level nuisance estimability from performance conditions for those specified learners.

Add a boundary corollary characterizing when support clipping is inactive, so the exact C_P frontier reduces explicitly to Lanners et al.'s un-clipped conditional intervals while the cancellation witness remains strict.

recommended_next_step: Revise the redundant mixture condition into a derived lemma, then advance the repaired field-tier compatibility kernel to Stage 0.
